hero.title: LV87 VIE ALLIANCE
hero.subtitle: Gathering strong, organized, and professional warriors
hero.slogan: "Enjoy the journey and the fun of playing together, instead of just focusing on the destination."
hero.warning: Strictly forbidden to hijack other players' ships or steal secret missions.

points.title: Score
points.desc: Minimum 7.2M/day or 43.2M/week. Failure to achieve will result in demotion to R1 and potential removal.

shield.title: Shield Up
shield.desc: Every Saturday, non-combatant members must activate shields. Point trading with opponents is strictly prohibited.

base.title: Base Layout
base.desc: Bases must be organized before the Sunday server reset.

online.title: Online
online.desc: Offline for more than 1 day -> R1; multiple days -> considered for removal from the alliance.

attack.title: Attack
attack.desc: Only attack players without an alliance. Do not hijack trucks/missions from the same server without consent.

registration.title: Registration & Approval
registration.desc: Registration deadline before Wednesday reset. Priority given to high power members.

penalty_main.title: Absence Penalty (Main Squad)
penalty_main.desc: 1st time: 1-week ban. 2nd time: 3-week ban. 3rd time: Permanent ban.

safety_points.title: Safety Points
safety_points.desc: Main squad must reach 700,000 points per round (subject to change).

spirit.title: Sharing Spirit
spirit.desc: Encouraged to give spots to substitutes once points are reached and the situation is stable.

banned.title: Suspended List
banned.note: The list will be updated regularly

footer.rights: © 2026 LV87 VIE Alliance. All rights reserved.
footer.built_with: Built with ❤️ for the LV87 VIE community
